input-messages: Migrate this static website from John Sundell's Publish to Hugo. Make sure the website works the same: Don't break any links, functionallity, etc

awesome. now let's give this website a modern look make over:

BRAND POSITIONING

Align is a time blocking planner designed to:
	•	Bring calm to busy days
	•	Help people with ADHD reduce overwhelm
	•	Help organized people structure their day beautifully
	•	Help busy professionals and parents stay on track

Tone:
Warm, gentle, structured, never hustle-culture.

⸻

DESIGN SYSTEM

1. COLOR SYSTEM

Light Mode

Primary Background:
#FBF8F1 (warm paper)

Section Alternate:
#F4EFE6

Card Background:
#FFFFFF

Primary Text:
#121212

Secondary Text:
#2A2A2A

Muted Text:
#6A6A6A

Subtle Borders:
#E6E0D6

Accent Color (Align Orange):
#F28C28

Use accent sparingly:
	•	Underlines
	•	Small badges
	•	Primary CTAs
	•	Active states

Never use full bright color sections.

⸻

Dark Mode

Primary Background:
#121212

Section Alternate:
#181818

Card Background:
#1F1F1F

Primary Text:
#FFFFFF

Secondary Text:
#EAEAEA

Muted Text:
#A0A0A0

Borders:
#2A2A2A

Accent Orange remains #F28C28.

Dark mode must feel like ink on paper, not neon tech.

⸻

2. TYPOGRAPHY

Headings: Serif (editorial feel)
Use: Canela, Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond, or Libre Baskerville.

Body: Sans serif
Use: Inter or SF Pro.

Type scale:

H1:
	•	64–72px desktop
	•	34–38px mobile
	•	Line height 110%

H2:
	•	42–48px desktop
	•	28–32px mobile

H3:
	•	28px desktop
	•	22px mobile

Body:
	•	16–18px
	•	Line height 150%

Titles are serif.
Body text is sans.
No all-caps headings.

⸻

3. LAYOUT SYSTEM

Max content width: 1080–1200px.

Section vertical spacing:
	•	120px desktop
	•	80px mobile

Side padding:
	•	24px mobile
	•	40px tablet
	•	80px desktop

White space is intentional and generous.

No cluttered feature grids.

⸻

4. COMPONENT STYLE

Buttons:
	•	Radius 12–16px
	•	No heavy shadows
	•	Subtle shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)

Primary Button:
Background: #121212
Text: #FFFFFF

Secondary Button:
Outlined
Text: #121212

Cards:
Radius 18px
Subtle border
No heavy gradients

Links:
Default text color
Underline appears on hover
Accent underline animation is subtle

⸻

5. MOTION

Transitions:
200–300ms
Ease-out

No bouncy animations.
No exaggerated effects.

⸻

VISUAL PRINCIPLES

Do NOT:
	•	Use loud gradients
	•	Use neon colors
	•	Use startup-style blobs
	•	Use stock productivity clichés
	•	Overuse emojis
	•	Add big colorful sections

Do:
	•	Keep layout calm
	•	Use warm neutral backgrounds
	•	Emphasize white space
	•	Use thin accent underlines
	•	Keep UI polished and minimal

please, for the serif use apple new york heavy and fallback to another similar one for non apple platforms. ANd sure, do a second polish pass focused specifically on mobile spacing and typography fine-tuning
payload.last-assistant-message:
Implemented. The serif stack now uses Apple New York first (with heavy heading weight), with a close non-Apple fallback, and I completed a second mobile-focused spacing/typography polish pass.

**What changed**
- Serif + fallback stack:
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:6` sets `--font-serif: "New York", "Libre Baskerville", ...`
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:57` sets heading weight to `800` (heavy look)
  - `tailwind.config.js:12` updates Tailwind serif family to New York-first fallback
- Font loading:
  - `layouts/partials/head.html:50` now loads `Inter` + `Libre Baskerville` (New York remains system-first on Apple)
- Mobile typography/spacing polish:
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:373` adds/refines mobile typography scale and line-height
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:399` tightens mobile shell/nav spacing
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:424` allows nav items to wrap cleanly on small screens
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:452` refines hero subtitle sizing/line-height
  - `Sources/Theme/theme.css:475` refines prose/body readability on mobile
- Template-level mobile refinements:
  - `layouts/blog/single.html:14` changed meta block to `text-base md:text-xl`
  - `layouts/partials/item-grid.html:2` changed section text to `text-base md:text-xl` and tighter mobile grid spacing
  - `layouts/_default/list.html:10`, `layouts/_default/single.html:19`, `layouts/404.html:16` reduced vertical spacer on mobile (`h-12 md:h-20`)
  - `layouts/index.html:4` reduced hero bottom spacing on mobile (`pb-10 md:pb-16`)
  - `layouts/_default/taxonomy.html:7`, `layouts/_default/terms.html:7` tuned mobile text/padding
  - `layouts/partials/waitlist.html:8` fixed alignment utility to `justify-start`
- Rebuilt generated CSS:
  - `Resources/styles.css` regenerated from updated theme

**Verification**
- `npx tailwindcss -i Sources/Theme/theme.css -o Resources/styles.css` passed.
- `hugo --cleanDestinationDir` passed.
- `hugo --printPathWarnings --printUnusedTemplates --printI18nWarnings` passed with only existing “unused template” warnings (no broken path/link warnings).
- I did not change content URLs or route href targets, so links/functionality remain intact.
